name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Cortex
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `cortex ...`
2. With input file: (describe format/contents)
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message/traceback if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (e.g., 3.12)
- Cortex version: (e.g., 1.2.1)
- Installation: `pip install cortex-identity` / from source
- Extras installed: (e.g., `[crypto]`, `[postgres]`, `[full]`)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
